title: Reproduce_nutrition: reproduction of the public figures of "Sugar-rich foods exacerbate antibiotic-induced microbiome injury"
description:
A clean, runnable reproduction of the publicly shareable (non-PHI) figures of the dietary-sugar / microbiome manuscript, built from a small set of de-identified released tables. Every panel is rebuilt by a numbered R script that reads only from released_data/ and writes one PDF per panel.

Scripts are organised by analysis family rather than by printed figure: expensive Bayesian models are fit once and cached, then consumed by the panels that need them. Panels depending on non-public (but PHI-free) clinical tables live under reproduce/restricted/ and skip cleanly when those inputs are absent.

The accompanying manuscript is under review. Once it is published, please cite the article in preference to this software.
